words.exampleBs: Moj prijatelj živi u susjednoj četvrti.
words.exampleEn: My friend lives in the neighbouring district.

words.exampleArabic: تَجْتَمِعُ الْعَائِلَةُ كُلَّ جُمُعَةٍ عَلَى الْغَدَاءِ.
words.exampleBs: Porodica se okuplja svaki petak na ručku.
words.exampleEn: The family gathers every Friday for lunch.

words.exampleBs: Susret između prijatelja bio je ugodan.
words.exampleEn: The meeting between friends was enjoyable.

words.exampleBs: Počeo je pozdravom prije govora.
words.exampleEn: He began with a greeting before speaking.

words.exampleBs: Primio sam poziv na vjenčanje.
words.exampleEn: I received an invitation to the wedding.

words.exampleBs: Između njih dvojice odvio se dugačak razgovor.
words.exampleEn: A long conversation took place between the two of them.

words.exampleBs: Kontaktirao ga je putem telefona.
words.exampleEn: He contacted him via the phone.

words.exampleBs: Poslala je tekstualnu poruku svojoj prijateljici.
words.exampleEn: She sent a text message to her friend.

words.exampleBs: Objavila je lijepu fotografiju na internetu.
words.exampleEn: She posted a beautiful photo on the internet.

words.exampleBs: Učešće u društvenim aktivnostima se podstiče.
words.exampleEn: Participation in social activities is encouraged.

words.exampleBs: Snažno društvo temelji se na saradnji.
words.exampleEn: A strong community is built on cooperation.

words.exampleBs: Odnos između njih temelji se na povjerenju.
words.exampleEn: The relationship between them is based on trust.

words.exampleBs: Odrastao je u staroj narodnoj četvrti.
words.exampleEn: He grew up in an old popular neighbourhood.

words.exampleBs: Priredili smo veliku proslavu povodom praznika.
words.exampleEn: We held a big celebration on the occasion of the holiday.

words.exampleBs: Ovo je stara porodična tradicija.
words.exampleEn: This is an old family tradition.

words.exampleArabic: الْحَدَثُ الثَّقَافِيُّ يَجْمَعُ النَّاسَ مِنْ كُلِّ مَكَانٍ.
words.exampleBs: Kulturni događaj okuplja ljude iz svih krajeva.
words.exampleEn: The cultural event brings people together from everywhere.

words.exampleBs: Društvena komunikacija je neophodna u našem životu.
words.exampleEn: Social communication is necessary in our lives.

words.exampleBs: Arapska kultura je bogata i raznovrsna.
words.exampleEn: Arab culture is rich and diverse.

words.exampleBs: Uzajamno poštovanje je temelj svakog odnosa.
words.exampleEn: Mutual respect is the foundation of every relationship.

words.exampleBs: Saradnja između komšija jača zajednicu.
words.exampleEn: Cooperation between neighbours strengthens the community.

words.exampleBs: Naš komšija je uvijek darežljiv i spreman na saradnju.
words.exampleEn: Our neighbour is always generous and cooperative.

words.exampleBs: Dočekali smo gosta s toplinom.
words.exampleEn: We received the guest warmly.

words.exampleBs: Pozvan sam na proslavu rođendana.
words.exampleEn: I was invited to a birthday party.

words.exampleArabic: أَحْضَرَتْ هَدِيَّةً لِصَدِيقَتِهَا فِي عِيدِ مِيلَادِهَا.
words.exampleBs: Donijela je poklon svojoj prijateljici za njen rođendan.
words.exampleEn: She brought a gift for her friend on her birthday.

words.exampleBs: Pridružio se grupi za učenje jezika.
words.exampleEn: He joined the language learning group.

words.exampleArabic: أَظْهَرَ الْمُجْتَمَعُ تَضَامُنًا كَبِيرًا فِي الْأَزْمَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Zajednica je pokazala veliku solidarnost u krizi.
words.exampleEn: The community showed great solidarity during the crisis.

words.exampleBs: Odanost prijateljima je plemenita osobina.
words.exampleEn: Loyalty to friends is a noble quality.

words.exampleBs: Tolerancija je velika ljudska vrijednost.
words.exampleEn: Tolerance is a great human value.

words.exampleBs: Čuvamo naše porodične tradicije.
words.exampleEn: We preserve our family traditions.

words.exampleBs: Čovjek je po prirodi društveno biće.
words.exampleEn: The human being is by nature a social creature.

words.exampleArabic: الْكَرَمُ مِنْ أَبْرَزِ سِمَاتِ الضِّيَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Darežljivost je jedna od najistaknutijih osobina arapskog gostoprimstva.
words.exampleEn: Generosity is one of the most prominent traits of Arab hospitality.

words.exampleBs: Njihovo prijateljstvo počelo je susretom upoznavanja.
words.exampleEn: Their friendship began with a meeting of introduction.

words.exampleBs: Prisustvovao je godišnjem porodičnom skupu.
words.exampleEn: He attended the annual family gathering.

words.exampleArabic: أَجْرَيْتُ اتِّصَالًا مَعَ صَدِيقِي بَعْدَ غِيَابٍ طَوِيلٍ.
words.exampleBs: Pozvao sam prijatelja nakon dugog odsustva.
words.exampleEn: I made contact with my friend after a long absence.

words.exampleArabic: الِانْتِمَاءُ إِلَى مَجْمُوعَةٍ يَمْنَحُ الشُّعُورَ بِالأَمَانِ.
words.exampleBs: Pripadnost grupi daje osjećaj sigurnosti.
words.exampleEn: Belonging to a group gives a sense of security.

words.exampleArabic: أَبْدَى تَعَاطُفًا كَبِيرًا مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِ فِي الأَزْمَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Pokazao je veliku empatiju prema prijateljima u krizi.
words.exampleEn: He showed great empathy towards his friends during the crisis.

words.exampleArabic: أَمْضَى وَقْتًا طَوِيلًا عَلَى الشَّبَكَةِ الاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Proveo je dugo vremena na društvenoj mreži.
words.exampleEn: He spent a long time on the social network.

words.exampleBs: Sreo je starog prijatelja na ulici.
words.exampleEn: He met his old friend on the street.

words.exampleBs: Pozvao je prijatelje na gozbu.
words.exampleEn: He invited his friends to a feast.

words.exampleBs: Podijelio je svoje ideje sa grupom.
words.exampleEn: He shared his ideas with the group.
